posts.author: RyanBY (Ryan BY)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
Multiple users are using the GoogleCal → Monday integration and I would like the calendar owner to be set as the created item owner.

e.g.
Monday user A auto creates a Monday item where User A is the owner of this item,
Monday user B auto creates a Monday item where User B is the owner of this item.

Does someone have an idea how do I do that as the “events creator” can be someone else, including customers.
I tried to set “Owner” to be Event’s creator but it’s doing nothing.

Thanks.
